_comment: Centralised log strings for 68-user-mgmt. Keep wording consistent across leaves so log scraping stays simple.

messages.osDetectFail: could not detect OS: uname returned '%s' (failure: only Linux and macOS are supported)
messages.needRoot: this operation needs root; re-run with sudo (failure: useradd/dscl require elevation)
messages.missingTool: required tool not found: '%s' (failure: install it then retry)
messages.groupAddFail: failed to add user '%s' to group '%s' (failure: %s)
messages.passwordSetFail: failed to set password for user '%s' (failure: %s)
messages.passwordFileBadMode: password file '%s' has mode '%s' (failure: must be 0600 or stricter; refusing to read)
messages.passwordFileMissing: password file '%s' not found (failure: cannot read)
messages.jsonParseFail: JSON file '%s' is not valid JSON (failure: %s)
messages.jsonShapeUnknown: JSON file '%s' is neither an object nor an array (failure: top-level must be {} or [])
messages.jsonRecordBad: JSON record #%s in '%s' is missing required field '%s' (failure: skipping record)
messages.noNameField: record has no 'name' field (failure: cannot identify target)
messages.dryRunBanner: DRY RUN -- no changes will be applied
messages.sshKeyMalformed: ssh key looks malformed (does not start with a known algo): '%s' -- skipping this entry
messages.sshKeyNoneValid: no valid ssh keys found among %s requested source(s) (--ssh-key/--ssh-key-file/--ssh-key-url) (failure: nothing to install)
messages.sshHomeMissing: home dir '%s' does not exist for user '%s' -- skipping ssh key install (failure: create home first)
messages.sshOwnerWarn: could not chown '%s' to '%s' -- file is in place but owner unchanged
messages.sshKeyInstalled: installed ssh keys to '%s' (sources_requested=%s -> keys_parsed=%s -> keys_unique=%s -> keys_installed_new=%s; pre-existing keys preserved=%s)
messages.sshKeySummaryRow: ssh-key summary for '%s': sources_requested=%s keys_parsed=%s keys_unique=%s keys_installed_new=%s preserved=%s
messages.schemaFieldType: JSON record #%s in '%s' field '%s' has wrong type: expected %s, got %s (failure: rejecting record)
messages.schemaFieldEmpty: JSON record #%s in '%s' field '%s' is empty/null (failure: rejecting record)
messages.schemaArrayItemType: JSON record #%s in '%s' field '%s[%s]' has wrong type: expected non-empty string, got %s (value=%s) (failure: rejecting record)
messages.schemaUnknownField: JSON record #%s in '%s' has unknown field '%s' (warning: ignored -- check for typo; allowed fields: %s)
messages.schemaRecordRejected: JSON record #%s in '%s' (name='%s') rejected: %s validation error(s) -- see above (failure: not creating user)
messages.schemaTopLevelType: JSON record #%s in '%s' is not an object: got %s (failure: rejecting record)
messages.sshUrlFetched: fetched ssh key(s) from URL '%s' (HTTP %s, %s bytes, %s key(s) parsed)
messages.sshUrlFetchFail: could not fetch ssh keys from URL '%s' (failure: %s -- skipping this URL)
messages.sshUrlNotAllowed: ssh key URL host '%s' is not in the allowlist (failure: refusing to fetch from '%s'; allowed hosts: %s; pass --ssh-key-url-allowlist to extend)
messages.sshUrlTooBig: ssh key URL '%s' returned more than %s bytes (failure: refusing oversized response; raise --ssh-key-url-max-bytes if intentional)
messages.sshUrlInsecure: ssh key URL '%s' uses insecure scheme (failure: only https:// is allowed; pass --allow-insecure-url to override at your own risk)
messages.sshUrlNoCurl: neither curl nor wget is on PATH -- cannot fetch ssh key URLs (failure: install curl)
messages.manifestWritten: wrote ssh-key manifest '%s' (run-id=%s, user=%s, %s key(s) tracked)
messages.manifestWriteFail: failed to write ssh-key manifest '%s' (failure: %s -- rollback for this run will not be possible)
messages.manifestNotFound: ssh-key manifest not found for run-id '%s' (looked in '%s'; failure: cannot roll back -- list available runs with --list)
messages.manifestParseFail: ssh-key manifest '%s' is not valid JSON (failure: %s)
messages.manifestListEmpty: no ssh-key manifests found in '%s' (nothing to roll back)
messages.removeNoUser: user '%s' from manifest no longer exists on this host (failure: cannot edit their authorized_keys)
messages.removeNoAuthKeys: authorized_keys file '%s' does not exist for user '%s' (nothing to roll back -- already clean)
messages.removeKeyMissing: fingerprint '%s' from manifest not present in '%s' (skipping -- already removed or rotated)
messages.removeSummary: rollback complete for run-id '%s': %s tracked / %s removed / %s already-missing (file: %s)
messages.removeWriteFail: failed to rewrite '%s' after rollback (failure: %s -- ORIGINAL FILE PRESERVED at '%s.bak.%s')
messages.removeBackupMade: backed up '%s' to '%s' before rollback (restore with: mv '%s' '%s')
